meanings.definition: suggestive of an elf in strangeness and otherworldliness; ; - John Mason Brown
examples: thunderbolts quivered with elfin flares of heat lightning
the fey quality was there, the ability to see the moon at midday
she was an elfin creature--graceful and delicate
obsessed by things elfin and small

meanings.definition: relating to or made or done by or as if by an elf
examples: all the little creatures joined in the elfin dance
perpetrated a practical joke with elfin delight
